`extern float mpLib_804D8050` introduces a brand-new data anchor: the symbol did not exist in the base file and this diff adds the extern, its use, and the definition together. Do not "Create static literals or globals solely to force data order" — "using an extern to make a function match is just due to data ordering". Keep literals inline unless data ownership evidence says otherwise.
